topic: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

questions.hindi: मैंने कल चावल खाया।
questions.english: I ate rice yesterday.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I ate rice yesterday."
questions.grammarRule: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
questions.category: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) practice

questions.hindi: जब वह आया, मैं खाना खा रहा था।
questions.english: I was eating food when he came.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I was eating food when he came."
questions.grammarRule: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
questions.category: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) practice

questions.hindi: उसके आने से पहले मैं खाना खा चुका था।
questions.english: I had eaten food before he came.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + V2 | was/were + V1+ing | had + V3 | had + been + V1+ing
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I had eaten food before he came."
questions.grammarRule: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
questions.category: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) practice
